core_info.address: Unit 115/193 S Pine Rd, Brendale QLD 4500

service_list.name: Roof Cleaning
service_list.brief: Pressure cleaning removes dirt, debris, mould and flaking paint so the roof is refreshed and ready for long-lasting coating adhesion.

service_list.name: Roof Painting
service_list.brief: Roof painting gives the roof a vibrant new look while protecting it from the elements.

service_list.name: Roof Repair
service_list.brief: The team handles roof repairs such as broken tiles, persistent leaks, damaged flashing and other roof issues.

service_list.name: Roof Restoration
service_list.brief: Full roof restorations cover inspection, cleaning, repairs, re-bedding, re-pointing and a multi-coat paint system.

service_list.name: Leak Detection
service_list.brief: Weatherproof Restorations offers leak detection for customers needing roofing issues identified and repaired.

service_list.name: Repointing
service_list.brief: The team provides repointing as part of roof repair and restoration work to keep roofs properly sealed.

service_list.name: Rebedding
service_list.brief: Weatherproof Restorations offers rebedding as part of preparing and restoring roof structure and seal integrity.

service_list.name: Solar Panel Cleaning
service_list.brief: Weatherproof Restorations lists solar panel cleaning among its roofing-related services.

key_messaging: Experience the Weatherproof difference. Quality you can trust
Servicing all throughout South East Queensland

improved_hero_copy.h1: Brisbane Roof Restorations Built To Handle Queensland Weather
improved_hero_copy.subhead: Get honest advice, free inspections and licensed roof restoration, repair, cleaning and painting from a local team led by Nick Parry.

improved_hero_copy.h1: Protect Your Roof Before Small Damage Becomes A Costly Repair
improved_hero_copy.subhead: Weatherproof Restorations helps Brisbane Northside and Caboolture homeowners repair, clean, repaint and restore roofs with clear quotes and no pressure.

improved_hero_copy.h1: Restore Street Appeal. Stop Leaks. Weatherproof Your Home.
improved_hero_copy.subhead: From broken tiles to full roof restorations, our qualified team gives your roof a cleaner, stronger, longer-lasting finish.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Roof Cleaning
improved_service_descriptions.description: Remove built-up dirt, mould, debris and flaking paint with professional high-pressure cleaning that prepares your roof for stronger protection and a cleaner finish.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Roof Painting
improved_service_descriptions.description: Refresh your home’s appearance and protect your roof from heat, rain and UV exposure with a durable roof coating system.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Roof Repair
improved_service_descriptions.description: Fix leaks, cracked tiles, damaged flashing and other roof problems early before they lead to water damage or larger repair costs.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Roof Restoration
improved_service_descriptions.description: Give your roof a complete reset with inspection, repairs, cleaning, rebedding, repointing and repainting for long-term weather protection.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Leak Detection
improved_service_descriptions.description: Find the source of roof leaks quickly so the right repair can be completed before water damage spreads.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Repointing
improved_service_descriptions.description: Renew cracked or worn pointing to help seal the roof and protect ridge caps from water entry.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Rebedding
improved_service_descriptions.description: Reset loose or deteriorated bedding to strengthen ridge caps and support a longer-lasting restoration.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Solar Panel Cleaning
improved_service_descriptions.description: Keep solar panels cleaner and more efficient with professional cleaning from a team already equipped for roof work.

meta_descriptions.description: Weatherproof Restorations provides roof cleaning, painting, repairs and restorations across Brisbane Northside, Caboolture and South East Queensland.
Learn about Weatherproof Restorations, founded by Nick Parry in 2018 and built on honest, reliable roofing services across Brisbane Northside.
Contact Weatherproof Restorations in Brendale for roof restoration, repairs, cleaning, painting, leak detection and roofing quotes.

meta_descriptions.page: Top Signs Your Roof Needs Immediate Attention
meta_descriptions.description: Spot urgent roof warning signs including leaks, sagging, broken tiles, clogged gutters, water stains and damaged flashing.

meta_descriptions.page: All You Need to Know About Our Full Roof Restorations
meta_descriptions.description: Understand what a full roof restoration includes, from inspection and pressure cleaning to rebedding, repointing, repairs and repainting.

meta_descriptions.page: Why Brisbane’s Climate Affects Your Roof More Than You Think
meta_descriptions.description: Learn how Brisbane heat, storms, heavy rain and humidity affect roofs and why regular inspections and repairs matter.
Find nine common signs your roof needs repair, including missing tiles, water damage, sagging, flashing issues, mould and rising energy bills.

meta_descriptions.page: What Is a Green Roof & Are They a Good Idea?
meta_descriptions.description: Explore the benefits, risks and practical considerations of green roofs, plus when conventional roof restoration is the better option.
See why roof restoration is safer and more effective with licensed professionals, from inspections and repairs to coatings and warranties.

meta_descriptions.page: Planning To Sell? How’s Your Roof?
meta_descriptions.description: Preparing to sell? Learn how roof cleaning, repairs and restoration can improve street appeal, buyer confidence and property presentation.

trust_signals_to_emphasize: Servicing Brisbane Northside and up to Caboolture
Servicing all throughout South East Queensland

brief.redesign_brief: Keep the strong local roofing positioning, the Weatherproof Restorations name, the phone-first quote flow, before-and-after proof, founder story, warranty message and South East Queensland service-area focus. Improve the redesign by cleaning up repeated header content, fixing inconsistent claims such as 25+ versus 30+ years, making services easier to scan, strengthening trust proof with licence details if available, improving contact-form hierarchy and turning the current blog-heavy content into clearer conversion paths. This redesign matters because the business already has strong trust signals and practical service content, but the current site buries them under repetition, inconsistent wording and weak page structure that could reduce quote enquiries.

ready_to_build_concerns: No ABN, QBCC or licence number was found in the supplied scrape despite claims of being licensed and insured.
Experience claims are inconsistent: 30+ years, over 25 years, 125 years combined and 250 years combined all appear in different places.
No real customer testimonials were found in the supplied pages.
Primary and accent colour hex values were not available from the supplied scrape.
Font family was not available from the supplied scrape.
WooCommerce and a product-style Colour Visualiser URL appear, so ecommerce/plugin behaviour should be confirmed before rebuild scope is locked.
The contact URL in some blog copy points to /contact/ while the crawled contact page is /contact-us/.
